title: Chest X-Ray Multi-Task Research
subtitle: Telplastina: multi-task CXR system for clinical AI-assisted diagnosis

milestones.role: Researcher · Classification and Segmentation Module Lead
highlights: Recruited and set up the team. My two modules: pathology classification and organ segmentation.

Classification: fine-tuned TorchXRayVision DenseNet121 on VinBig (14 labels) and NIH ChestX-ray14 (14 labels). Also trained a DeiT-based model to compare architectures. Input: center-cropped 224x224 in XRV-native intensity range, sigmoid output.

Segmentation: TorchXRayVision PSPNet. Three structures — right lung (index 5), left lung (index 4), heart (index 8). Square-padded input, threshold 0.5, outputs: binary masks + bounding boxes + colored overlay PNG. DICOM read via pydicom.
Packaged both as FastAPI microservices for the backend team. Both the web app (React + Next.js) and desktop app (Tauri v2) consume the same endpoints.
The system also has report generation, VQA, and visual grounding modules — those are handled by other team members.
